allow: Bash(AWS_PROFILE=career uv run rickos career site publish db/jobs/Exactera/Lead-Data-Platform-Engineer/posting.md)
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=career RICKOS_SITE_BUCKET=rickarko-career-sites uv run rickos career site publish db/jobs/Exactera/Lead-Data-Platform-Engineer/posting.md --bucket rickarko-career-sites)
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=career aws s3api head-object --bucket rickarko-career-sites --key exactera/index.html)

Bash(AWS_PROFILE=career aws cloudfront list-distributions --query "DistributionList.Items[?contains\(Aliases.Items, 'exactera.rickarko.com'\) || contains\(Aliases.Items, 'rickarko.com'\)].{Id:Id,Aliases:Aliases.Items,Status:Status}" --output json)

Bash(curl -s "https://exactera.rickarko.com/?cb=$\(date +%s%N\)" echo "--- md5 compare ---" md5sum /tmp/live_now.html /home/ricka/Git/RickArkoOS/db/jobs/Exactera/Lead-Data-Platform-Engineer/site/index.html echo "" echo "--- cosmetics count live ---" grep -c "cosmetics retailer" /tmp/live_now.html echo "" echo "--- security count live ---" grep -c "Security program owner" /tmp/live_now.html echo "" echo "--- All GBDT lines in live ---" grep -oE "[^>]*GBDT[^<]*" /tmp/live_now.html)

Bash(curl -s "https://exactera.rickarko.com/?cb=$\(date +%s%N\)" echo "--- Banner ---" grep -oE 'num">[^<]+
[^<]+' /tmp/live.html echo "" echo "--- Role / title appearances ---" grep -oE "[^>]*Platform Owner[^<]*" /tmp/live.html)
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=career aws s3api get-object-acl --bucket rickarko-career-sites --key exactera/resume.pdf)
